title: Mighty Spicy Scottish Mung Bean Sprout Wrap
description: A spicy and chewy Scottish dish featuring mung bean sprouts, perfect for a hangover cure, wrapped in a low-carb friendly ti leaf wrap. This dish is a unique blend of Scottish and Asian flavors.
instructions: Rinse the mung bean sprouts and drain well.
In a large pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the diced scottish bonnet peppers and cook until tender.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mung bean sprouts and cook until they start to soften.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the mung bean sprouts and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sprouts are tender but still crisp.
Meanwhile, prepare the ti leaves by washing and drying them.
To assemble the wrap, place a portion of the mung bean sprout mixture onto a ti leaf and fold the leaf to enclose.
